data.title: Hyperliquid mainnet has launched a "priority fee" mechanism, allowing users to pay HYPE to prioritize reading data or writing orders.
data.description: Jeff, the founder of Hyperliquid, announced on Discord that the Priority Fees mechanism is now live on the mainnet in Alpha mode. This includes Gossip Priority Fees (for prioritizing data reads) and Order Priority Fees (for prioritizing order writes), details of which can be found in the official documentation. It's also worth noting that, based on user feedback, the upper limit for Order Priority Fees has been reduced from 20 bps to 8 bps. Currently, Order Priority Fees only apply to IOC orders on HIP-3 assets.

data.title: Hyperliquid Launches Priority Fees Mechanism in Alpha Mode
data.description:
Hyperliquid founder Jeff announced on Discord that the Priority Fees mechanism is now live on the mainnet in Alpha mode. According to Odaily, this includes Gossip Priority Fees for prioritizing data reading and Order Priority Fees for prioritizing order writing. More details can be found in the official documentation.

Additionally, based on user feedback, the cap for Order Priority Fees has been reduced from 20 basis points to 8 basis points. Currently, Order Priority Fees apply only to IOC orders on HIP-3 assets.

data.title: Pershing Square Initiates IPO for U.S. Company Merger
data.description: Pershing Square has announced the launch of an initial public offering (IPO) for the merger of a U.S. company. According to Jin10, the IPO is set with a share price of $50.00 and aims to raise at least $5 billion.

data.title: India Faces Below-Average Monsoon Amid Rising Farmer Challenges
data.description: India is expected to experience a below-average monsoon this year, which could exacerbate the difficulties faced by farmers. Bloomberg posted on X that the agricultural sector is already grappling with increased input costs due to the ongoing Middle East conflict. This weather forecast adds to the challenges for farmers who rely heavily on monsoon rains for their crops. The situation could potentially impact agricultural output and economic stability in the region.

data.title: Elon Musk Assembles Team for Ambitious Chip Plant Project
data.description: Elon Musk is reportedly assembling a team to realize his vision of establishing a large-scale chip manufacturing facility. Bloomberg posted on X that Musk's initiative aims to address the growing demand for advanced semiconductor chips, which are crucial for various technological applications. The move comes amid global efforts to enhance chip production capabilities and reduce reliance on existing supply chains. Musk's plan is expected to leverage cutting-edge technology and innovation to create a state-of-the-art facility. Details regarding the location and timeline for the project remain undisclosed, but industry experts anticipate significant impacts on the semiconductor market.

data.title: Paris Blockchain Week 2026 to Feature High-Level French Officials and Global Executives
data.description: Paris Blockchain Week 2026 is set to take place on April 15 and 16 at the Carrousel du Louvre, featuring prominent French ministers, an ambassador, and nearly 20 Members of Parliament. According to NS3.AI, the conference anticipates attendees from over 100 countries, including top executives from major financial institutions such as BNP Paribas, HSBC, JPMorgan Chase, Goldman Sachs, and Morgan Stanley. The event aims to foster discussions on blockchain technology and its impact on global finance.

data.title: U.S. Court Allows White House Banquet Hall Project to Proceed Temporarily
data.description:
A U.S. federal appeals court has issued a temporary ruling allowing the construction of a White House banquet hall to continue for at least another week. According to BlockBeats, the decision was made by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit on Saturday, following a 2-1 vote by the panel. 

The ruling temporarily halts a previous order by Judge Richard Leon, appointed by George W. Bush, who had stopped the project in March. Judge Leon had ruled that the U.S. government lacked congressional authorization to proceed with the construction.

data.title: Polymarket Account Bets on Bilibili Gaming in Esports World Cup Qualifier
data.description: A Polymarket account, known for maintaining a win rate exceeding 77%, has invested approximately $58,000 on Bilibili Gaming to triumph over JD Gaming. According to NS3.AI, the wager was placed at an average price close to 92 cents. This match is part of a best-of-three series in the China qualifier for the Esports World Cup.

data.title: HSBC Completes Tokenized Deposit Service Pilot on Canton Network
data.description:
HSBC's Global Payment Solutions (GPS) division has successfully completed a pilot for tokenized deposit services (TDS) on the regulated public blockchain, Canton Network. According to Foresight News, the pilot simulated the full process of issuing, transferring, and atomic settlement of tokenized deposits alongside other digital assets. This marks the first issuance and use of HSBC's TDS on a public blockchain.

HSBC's TDS supports major currencies including USD, GBP, EUR, HKD, and SGD, allowing fiat deposits to be converted into digital tokens at a 1:1 ratio. These tokens can be instantly transferred on HSBC's ledger, enabling 24/7 real-time settlement and programmable payments.

Manish Kohli, head of HSBC Global Payment Solutions, highlighted that the pilot demonstrates the direction of tokenization in banking and the necessary infrastructure. The company's focus is on building secure and interoperable capabilities to allow clients to transfer funds more efficiently across different environments. Yuval Rooz, co-founder of Canton Network and CEO of Digital Asset, noted that tokenized deposits are rapidly being adopted in capital markets, corporate banking, and cash management, with Canton emerging as a key deployment network.

data.title: Circle CEO responds to controversy: USDC related to the Drift attack was not frozen because it did not involve legal proceedings.
data.description: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire stated that the company will not freeze wallet assets unrelated to legal proceedings in response to recent controversy surrounding the Drift attack. Previously, the DeFi protocol Drift suffered an attack of approximately $280 million, with some funds allegedly transferred as approximately $230 million USDC via cross-chain methods, sparking debate about whether these assets should be frozen. Allaire pointed out that such operations involve a "moral dilemma," but in the absence of legal grounds, Circle will not proactively freeze the funds. This incident drew criticism from industry insiders, including on-chain analyst ZachXBT, who argued that the platform should adopt more proactive fund control measures. (The Block)

data.title: Circle CEO Addresses Concerns Over USDC Usage and Future Plans
data.description: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire has stated that the use of USDC for Iran-linked transit tolls at the Strait of Hormuz is highly improbable due to the significant risk of asset freezes faced by sanctioned entities. According to NS3.AI, Allaire emphasized that Circle can only freeze wallets under the directive of law enforcement or judicial orders, following criticism related to the $285 million Drift Protocol exploit. Additionally, Allaire clarified that Circle has no intentions of issuing a Korean won stablecoin.

data.title: RAVE Trading Activity Surges Amid Market Movements
data.description:
On April 13, significant trading activity was observed in the cryptocurrency market. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a top-performing account known as 'Old Devil' initiated a substantial long position on a centralized exchange (CEX) with a margin of $9,995, acquiring 5,760 RAVE tokens at an opening price of $8.68 and a liquidation price of $7.44.

Additionally, another prominent account, 'Pursuing Freedom,' has been actively trading on a CEX, securing a long position with 49,000 RAVE tokens. This account has already realized a floating profit of $375,000, with an opening price of $1.157.

data.title: Strategy's Amplification Metric and Its Impact on Capital Structure
data.description: Strategy's amplification metric stands at approximately 33%, which evaluates the relationship between debt and debt-like instruments against its holdings of 766,970 BTC. According to NS3.AI, an increase in STRC activity could complicate the management of the capital structure and exert additional pressure on common equity. Meanwhile, MSTR has experienced an 11% decline over the past 30 days, despite Bitcoin's relatively stable performance.

data.title: An account with a win rate exceeding 77% purchased $58,000 in a League of Legends tournament match where BLG defeated JDG.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in the Polymarket prediction event for the "League of Legends Esports World Cup China Qualifier Stage 2: Bilibili Gaming vs. JD Gaming," an account with a win rate exceeding 77% (0x61ceb99e031a7460c96ebe9ac81a0a558f29ed13) placed approximately $58,000 bets on Bilibili Gaming defeating JD Gaming, with an average opening price of approximately 92¢. This match is a best-of-three (BO3) series. Bilibili Gaming has been performing strongly in the second stage of the LPL recently, currently holding a 2-0 record (4-1 in games), including a 2-1 victory over JD Gaming. JD Gaming currently has a 1-2 record (3-4 in games), and is under pressure overall. The winner of this match will have a chance to compete for a top-two spot and advance to the main stage of the Esports World Cup. Odaily Seer continuously focuses on the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: StarkWare to Restructure and Reduce Workforce Amid Revenue Focus
data.description: StarkWare has announced plans to reduce its workforce and reorganize into two distinct business units in an effort to generate significant revenue from its technology stack. According to NS3.AI, CEO Eli Ben-Sasson did not specify the number of employees affected or the timeline for these reductions. The reorganization will create a revenue-focused applications unit and a Starknet development unit.

data.title: Sentient Labs Executive to Attend Hong Kong Forum on Crypto and Smart Economy
data.description:
Sentient Labs' Asia-Pacific Director Anita will participate in the 'Crypto 2026: From Cryptocurrency to Smart Economy' forum in Hong Kong on April 19. According to ChainCatcher, the event is co-hosted by ChainCatcher and RootData and is a significant part of the Hong Kong Web3 Carnival.

Sentient Labs, a leading technology research and product organization, is committed to advancing open-source AI and is supported by major funds such as Founders Fund, Pantera Capital, and Franklin Templeton. The forum will focus on the paradigm shift resulting from the deep integration of AI technology and crypto networks, with discussions on AI Agent economy, smart payments, RWA, and crypto infrastructure.

This thematic forum serves as both an insight into the current industry landscape and a forward-thinking exploration of the future smart economic system.

data.title: VIX Index Rises Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description: The VIX Index, a key measure of market volatility, has increased by 2.01 points, reaching 21.24. According to ChainCatcher, this rise indicates growing uncertainty in the financial markets.

data.title: Circle CEO Highlights Need for Korean Won Stablecoin to Boost Competitiveness
data.description: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire emphasized the importance of a Korean won stablecoin for South Korea to maintain its competitive edge in the global market. According to NS3.AI, Allaire clarified that Circle does not intend to issue a won-based stablecoin directly but is open to providing infrastructure support to companies that pursue such initiatives. He also highlighted Arc and the Circle Payments Network as potential opportunities for growth in South Korea.

data.title: Baoding Technology Projects Significant Profit Growth for Q1 2026
data.description: Baoding Technology has announced its financial expectations for the first quarter of 2026, projecting a net profit between 60 million and 70 million yuan, marking a year-on-year increase of 233.98% to 289.64%. According to Jin10, the company's improved profitability is attributed to the recovery in the copper-clad laminate and copper foil sectors, which has led to increased product sales and higher gross margins for FR4 and copper foil. Additionally, the sustained high prices of gold have contributed to the growth in revenue and gross margins for the company's finished gold products.

data.title: DeAgentAI has launched a $5 million AIA buyback and burn program, with the first phase of buybacks already completed.
data.description: DeAgentAI, a decentralized AI infrastructure project within the SUI and BNB ecosystem, announced the official launch of its AIA token buyback and burn program, totaling $5 million. Funding will come from project protocol revenue and trading revenue generated by its proprietary AI models. The buyback will be executed in three batches on the open market within 90 days, with all repurchased tokens being directly burned and permanently removed from circulation. There are no lock-up or redistribution arrangements. The first batch of AIA buyback and burn has already been completed, TX Hash: HBmTxfJymoymJTFSB5qtn4cV2pfd2SYS6PaGd5NPyFpf. DeAgentAI stated that the buyback funds come entirely from the project's own business revenue, not from external financing or token issuance. The burn record will be continuously updated.
